parameters.name: create_backup
parameters.description: Create a JSON backup of n8n-claw configuration and return a download link. Parameters: name (backup file name or empty string for auto-generated), scope (core=config only, full=everything including memory/conversations, custom=specify tables — default is full), tables (comma-separated table names, only used when scope is custom. Available tables: soul, agents, user_profiles, tools_config, projects, mcp_registry, template_credentials, memory_long, memory_daily, conversations, reminders, scheduled_actions, heartbeat_config, tasks)

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Backup file name or empty string for auto-generated name', 'string') }}
value.scope: ={{ $fromAI('scope', 'Scope: core, full, or custom — default full', 'string') }}
value.tables: ={{ $fromAI('tables', 'Comma-separated table names for custom scope or empty string', 'string') }}

schema.description: Backup file name or empty string

parameters.name: show_backup
parameters.description: View contents of a backup file without restoring. Parameters: url (URL to the backup JSON file, required), table (show only this specific table or empty string for overview)

value.table: ={{ $fromAI('table', 'Show only this table or empty string for overview', 'string') }}

parameters.name: restore_backup
parameters.description: Restore configuration from a backup file URL. Parameters: url (URL to the backup JSON file, required), tables (comma-separated list of tables to restore or empty string for all), mode (upsert=merge with existing data, replace=delete existing then insert — default upsert), include_credentials (true to include template_credentials in restore or empty string to skip them for security)

value.tables: ={{ $fromAI('tables', 'Comma-separated table names to restore or empty string for all', 'string') }}
value.mode: ={{ $fromAI('mode', 'Restore mode: upsert or replace — default upsert', 'string') }}
value.include_credentials: ={{ $fromAI('include_credentials', 'true to include template_credentials and tools_config (contain API keys) or empty string to skip them', 'string') }}

schema.description: Tables to restore or empty string
